subject: Educative Go just got a major update
body:
New to mobile: Daily Shorts, dev games, personalized tutorials with Fenzo, and more

* Note: You are receiving this platform-related update because you have an active Educative account. If you wish to unsubscribe from product or other updates related to your account, you can do so anytime.

Денис,

We launched Educative Go a couple of months ago. (If you haven't already, you can download it today for iOS (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VW-1K05V2RsgW7kPY_g3Jqn26W5_BCzp5Mp4J1N6G5Tsg3prCCW95jsWP6lZ3mkW2G1JT-89CylCW45QDbR8F-nZWW1dSPzn60gw_bW4Sqqfr2yWHb4W5ZQx7d6gG0lVVssNCz5hY0VrW94VLJd56vZQRW4TNb7D23TTM3W1tBXqn6wMP8jW5pGJH64sj8wdW1G1bG34m1bNYW79Mxzm47yNQ6W2yV_7C6kq4YwW739bYS2FzDFHW78dfJQ7Vxxv5N7bF0t-Cj0bKW99N0067GpRmGW1yfYKH6qBGm-W80q2_p5lH4VwW5LQQx06Q951WW7M8nMd1yRQJxM-c19PVPH27W78fvrw7_FMxjW5fXzww5L7K0gN62hqlmBHnBhW6fN1vD5JdPdMW7BPyKF3r-mjFW56pKMQ8nF68QN2T2xK2DSlcTN42VM4KGl0X7f6xKV-x04 ) and Android (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VW-1K05V2RsgW7kPY_g3Jqn26W5_BCzp5Mp4J1N6G5Tqb5m_5PW50kH_H6lZ3q6N4-M7rQDW27dW7SfSn080CSBzW44qPhX4lcd0TW65zd0l69GM9CW8Ss04-4LGLShW3Pp8YH5xP_BLW4vqz3J7nrNFQW6MBqqS3fHcGMW2Mqs_z23mngsW5mdlfp7_0ZVZW7vJYtg8NMRysVnhScZ4yd9D8W67Qwdz6C_8FfMmr9kr465y_W5yxvmf4Z7Y6_W4mQCGy77zfvwW2mkqwW2JvsQFN8JvD3pKqDzbW4kMbQt1kHt_LW5C00472Z7-wPW8H-Dzh2lHrHtN2v6KYbSdQlqW6d-SxF7RRPGlW561bdZ3NzPw6W5RfmW27lRHJPW4c4sNp2ZPWjVW5mTW286Q8QylW4dhTby2Th4xzW4wGyXK4f-HN4W8wlmSH458Q01VqX-Mj3N0Jg7MRwdkRn0mXzf43xPyP04 ) ).

Since then, we’ve shipped a ton of handy new features. The app you downloaded is not the app it is today, so be sure to update it now.

Here's everything that's new:

Daily Shorts (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VW-1K05V2RsgW7kPY_g3Jqn26W5_BCzp5Mp4J1N6G5Tsg3prCCW95jsWP6lZ3mCW4q9kBV160x8wW8XTJdw78k3nsW5dm9h76wcJZtW2D5dCk53bd6PW7j_mPn5R5T5wVmXQKZ4msLJJW7hLvfG7mHx5YW7bmkjk1K4fDcW84HD6P557s5GVMbQv_5Npc0TW97GXdX1JyC6-W1Q3ZXg2Vz_stVL0qdY2h17J3N6sxVKLfjKRMW5NqDM44ybzmNN70-FLSY5qLFV10TVR8GY4l8Vf4Kjh7XxZgFN2cl2kwvhSWVVGv3yH29rlh_W8Dz1Fs34bJWdW6cMCFf4GWtdHW1hRb7-253VR_W1XSXjW4mBc5WW5BBgpF6f9ZDcW98Npx-33CxpQW7R1byS2K-w-JW61k97W3fRxpLW8jMP8J16MMZ7W6Mm2PH6QYHb2dXZzRM04 ) — 5 completely new bite-sized learning cards every day. Each takes 30–60 seconds. Swipe through them during your downtime, learn something practical, and come back tomorrow for more.

Ship or Skip (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VW-1K05V2RsgW7kPY_g3Jqn26W5_BCzp5Mp4J1N6G5Tsg3prCCW95jsWP6lZ3pSW4MP1T47SXFbkW3n2Nft1wpnSDW41nYtG2WLXJ6N3v8CVnDndMgW7zbF3v1JSrn7VnbTCR5SnxCZW5BycY_4pnyQlW6LwYYD3SbFh8W1RVmR-3pK2r-W71yFy64Bhcw4W5hD49D79YGbXW3tsRl75h655tW1HcBwH2h7G44W2RlzDn3MjPyPVbYGfK54GLSGW4pN44s8PYfvGW67Pwq52F9M3cW3Btf5K1W005TW1Wf3J892ZNQWVQ54Gb6mLm2BW2hgF_14h0PwJW3mppcb9cj9JJW6F6nk_2BpJGzW1ZSqqg4y9NHMW8LYkXF11y_JZW7zcvTT6TKhb2W20V87r9kPkNdVN_Tb31GcB4zV_CXMV1yYx_rW6RVLV24hzLxYf8V0Bxd04 ) — A daily code review game. We show you 5 pull requests. You decide: ship it or skip it. Build real code review instincts in under 5 minutes.

Dev Wordle (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VW-1K05V2RsgW7kPY_g3Jqn26W5_BCzp5Mp4J1N6G5Tsg3prCCW95jsWP6lZ3mKW5w1RR_7v0ZQvW3yDV4_73zJWxW6wDc1y3cHtBgW91n6w97CfKG9W42N5RC4MMlt-W3vwb_x59RMF9W439py02glx0pN1x22dLXBNc_Vj66H65q-7wsW60T2m57S9n5jW2NQ45L1BSJ0YW8LdXYv8mTbRYW1tXhRq4PcM18W5mBFsj55_TGTW1z0Vy38fDMmdW2gQYxz2KT3JMW1Z0RCZ5CQQW6W5Vxsl73w8qzBW6FcddJ2PzMFcW43Qd3y7XVjgNW3qZrcR8dqd8GVwgc732_Ccc6W3Q-8Bm4l-JcpW8227wr99vV41W1ZT6L_737jRFW2m2YLC1xM6xDW5TKZk82DQzptW6cf7R15FMx62W97dl8M7Dr66DMxZ7nRMfSN0f7HMx2404 ) — Wordle, but for developers. Guess the programming term. One word, once a day.

Newsletter (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VW-1K05V2RsgW7kPY_g3Jqn26W5_BCzp5Mp4J1N6G5TqP5m_5PW69t95C6lZ3lwW2XXZ-v1yl6-sW5ThHTT6SRlPxW55042y4ht7ClW6WFy_04xZyDdW1JH6_T7Gqc2yW8rCFqT4jhmKJW3s3NQl5V39SzW7bj6RX1rSFKtW7Ts0bG4LJ1fhW4hmdDt80HX1gW65fTrD2-4ptsW79D37F8NYLgVW2j1FSP40xT3hW5mpl8D15pkk3W1DF-Cm1BtSPlW5sS2XB11Y5ZMN2PhCLx3NwC9W3Q7-jH2XL0bbN5Y7sdRl4YbLW6XKgsK7mYxqwW1Q_5Sx77SHZhW8ZzPlH3jGYzLN87hC49FRPvFN46zRfW5Hz65W12L6vl5Y-4khW3x4ypy4N67QsW4FQBKh50TSgDW91CR_D3JgG0tW7D6QDf6Q2NbGVmj5nD53xY2GW3jtth18lbXWRW3144jW1GW5nRW3TMdnY4t5cG3W7zZdKQ7jmdbYW2fG50r7kLMjqW6wcptK4qybw_f293yVP04 ) — The Educative Newsletter now lives in the app. Industry trends from a developer's perspective covering AI, System Design, and Cloud  — all in one feed.

Fenzo Tutorials (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VW-1K05V2RsgW7kPY_g3Jqn26W5_BCzp5Mp4J1N6G5Tsg3prCCW95jsWP6lZ3pYW7DL0YJ3fMSWCVc8hMb618prcW6gV6T_2nC1GVW948-Kb76CmWPW4bJbcb2GJxG-W7KfX8F2jV8RCVmk-Zr4gtdkHVPTbq11QVMxNW8bfjPY4p29WpW3bHRc7277q6QW6lbW0h4RYhvsW1wH2_53ZS62DW5nk2K331BYxYW5t0yrz4cXht3W5TqkwD4dcTTjW8k1Qzq7XXpk4V6R1D13fWQfMW6N6tH594CjNQW18brb-2zCfVwN5WZzV1jLq9bW2BQqpM8YC-5xN2lXDwXfHYdpW8ZV0n91CykrBW1Gs8Mm6MdCN5W4bk3qD6w0cWnW1mNlKY7kVJG6W81ynyF3vzrxFW4vqmqq8fPJ7qVXNlpN17x3vSW4t-nMG3z6SfNf69nH5Y04 ) — Need to learn something specific? Generate a custom, card-based tutorial on any topic using Fenzo. Structured learning on demand, not generic Q&A.

Ask Fenzo — Tap “Ask Fenzo” on any card to get a deeper breakdown of what you’re reading. Your generated summaries are saved so you can revisit them.

Time to go update your app. Happy learning!

– The Educative Team
